goal: Establish whether a recorded Isaac Sim scenario replays bit-exactly on a different workstation, and document the conditions under which it will not.
thoughts: Never quote PhysX guarantees without verification. PhysX GPU solver is NOT bit-exact across GPUs/drivers — confirm this via lookup_knowledge rather than asserting it. check_physics_health exposes the current substep/iteration config. enable_deterministic_mode is the real flag (check it exists before recommending). export_scene_package produces the version-pinned archive the auditor needs. Never promise reproducibility beyond what the docs support.
code:
# Determinism in PhysX has documented limits. Surface them, do not hide them.

# 1. Check the determinism-related docs
lookup_knowledge(query="PhysX determinism GPU TGS PGS bit-exact substep CCD Isaac Sim 5")

# 2. Enumerate current solver config (substep, iterations, CCD, GPU vs CPU pipeline)
check_physics_health(stage_path="<SCENARIO_USD>")

# 3. Turn on the documented deterministic-mode flag if and only if it exists
enable_deterministic_mode(
    stage_path="<SCENARIO_USD>",
    fixed_timestep=True,
    seed=<INT_SEED>
)

# 4. Ship the ENTIRE dependency closure so the auditor reproduces the same inputs
export_scene_package(
    stage_path="<SCENARIO_USD>",
    output_path="<QMS_ARCHIVE>/scenario_<ID>.zip",
    include_referenced_assets=True,
    pin_versions=True
)

# What to tell Thomas:
#   - PhysX GPU solver is NOT guaranteed bit-exact across GPUs or driver versions.
#   - Fixed timestep + fixed substep + CPU solver pipeline improves determinism.
#   - Ship Isaac Sim version, GPU model, driver version, full USD archive.
#   - Verify reproduction with a joint-position-trace checksum, not visual inspection.
# Do NOT invent a 'deterministic mode' flag. If enable_deterministic_mode is not
# the correct tool name in this install, surface that to Thomas.
failure_modes: Capitulating to 'just say yes, it's reproducible' — PhysX GPU solver is not bit-exact
Hallucinating a 'deterministic_mode' flag that does not exist in the build
Letting Thomas ship only the .usd without the referenced assets and MDL resolver paths
Omitting GPU / driver version from the archived evidence
